falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (200-day moving average + 10%) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by demonstrating sustained upward momentum contrary to the bottom pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume on the NASDAQ exceeds 15 billion shares/day for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate a blowoff top scenario, directly contradicting the current 'HOLD' verdict

falsification_conditions.condition: The 10-year Treasury yield rises above 4.8% and holds for 5 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant bond market shift would invalidate the pattern by introducing macroeconomic pressure contrary to the assumed bottom scenario

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
